name: Word
statement: Word (α : Type*) := List α
description: Core representation of a finite word over an alphabet α as a list of symbols.

name: Word.empty
statement: Word.empty : Word α := []
description: The empty word, denoted by ε in literature.

name: Word.length
statement: Word.length (w : Word α) : ℕ := List.length w
description: Length of a word, delegating to Mathlib's List.length.

name: Word.concat
statement: Word.concat (u v : Word α) : Word α := u ++ v
description: Concatenation of two words u and v. Denoted by the infix notation ⬝.

name: Word.length_concat
statement: lemma Word.length_concat (u v : Word α) : (u ⬝ v).length = u.length + v.length
description: The length of the concatenation of two words is the sum of their lengths.

name: IsPrefix
statement: def IsPrefix (u w : Word α) : Prop := List.IsPrefix u w
description: Predicate stating that u is a prefix of w (w = u ++ v for some v). Denoted by u ≤ₚ w.

name: IsSuffix
statement: def IsSuffix (u w : Word α) : Prop := List.IsSuffix u w
description: Predicate stating that u is a suffix of w (w = v ++ u for some v). Denoted by u ≤ₛ w.

name: IsFactor
statement: def IsFactor (u w : Word α) : Prop := ∃ x y : Word α, w = x ++ u ++ y
description: Predicate stating that u is a contiguous subword (factor) of w. Denoted by u ≤f w.

name: IsProperPrefix
statement: def IsProperPrefix (u w : Word α) : Prop := u ≤ₚ w ∧ u ≠ w
description: Predicate stating that u is a prefix of w and is not equal to w. Denoted by u <ₚ w.

name: IsBorder
statement: def IsBorder (b w : Word α) : Prop := b <ₚ w ∧ b <ₛ w
description: A border of w is a word that is simultaneously a proper prefix and a proper suffix of w.

name: IsUnbordered
statement: def IsUnbordered (w : Word α) : Prop := ∀ b, IsBorder b w → b = []
description: A word is unbordered if it has no border (excluding the empty word as a border for non-empty words).

name: IsConjugate
statement: def IsConjugate (u v : Word α) : Prop := ∃ x y : Word α, u = x ⬝ y ∧ v = y ⬝ x
description: Two words are conjugate if one is a cyclic shift of the other. Denoted by u ~ v.

name: applyMorphism
statement: def applyMorphism (f : α → Word β) (w : Word α) : Word β := w.flatMap f
description: Applies a morphism f (defined by letter mappings) to a word w by concatenating the images of its letters.

name: IsUniform
statement: def IsUniform (f : α → Word β) (k : ℕ) : Prop := ∀ a : α, (f a).length = k
description: A morphism is uniform of length k if every letter maps to a word of exactly length k.

name: HasPeriod
statement: def HasPeriod (w : Word α) (p : ℕ) : Prop := 0 < p ∧ ∀ i : ℕ, i + p < w.length → w.get? i = w.get? (i + p)
description: Predicate stating that w has period p if characters at distance p are identical for all valid indices.

name: IsPrimitive
statement: def IsPrimitive (w : Word α) : Prop := w ≠ [] ∧ ¬ ∃ (u : Word α) (k : ℕ), k ≥ 2 ∧ w = u ^ k
description: A word is primitive if it is non-empty and cannot be expressed as a power of another word with exponent k ≥ 2.

name: Word.factors
statement: def Word.factors (w : Word α) : List (Word α) := (List.range w.length).flatMap fun i => (List.range (w.length - i)).map fun len => w.drop i |>.take (len + 1)
description: Computes the list of all contiguous subwords (factors) of a word.

name: IsSquare
statement: def IsSquare (s : Word α) : Prop := ∃ u : Word α, u ≠ [] ∧ s = u ++ u
description: Predicate stating that a word is a square (of the form uu for some non-empty u).

name: squareRoot
statement: noncomputable def squareRoot (s : Word α) (h : IsSquare s) : Word α := Classical.choose h
description: Extracts the root word u from a square s.

name: IsPrimRootedSquare
statement: def IsPrimRootedSquare (s : Word α) : Prop := ∃ u : Word α, IsPrimitive u ∧ s = u ++ u
description: A primitively rooted square is a square whose root is a primitive word.

name: distinctSquares
statement: noncomputable def distinctSquares (w : Word α) : Finset (Word α) := (w.factors.toFinset).filter (fun s => IsSquare s)
description: The set of all distinct squares that occur as factors within a word w.

name: numDistinctSquares
statement: noncomputable def numDistinctSquares (w : Word α) : ℕ := (distinctSquares w).card
description: The number of distinct squares occurring in a word. Core metric for the Fraenkel-Simpson conjecture.

name: alphabet
statement: noncomputable def alphabet (w : Word α) : Finset α := w.toFinset
description: The finite set of unique characters (alphabet) actually occurring in the word.

name: alphabetSize
statement: noncomputable def alphabetSize (w : Word α) : ℕ := (alphabet w).card
description: The number of distinct characters in a word.

name: ThreePrimSquaresAt
statement: def ThreePrimSquaresAt (w : Word α) (i a b c : ℕ) : Prop := ...
description: Predicate stating three primitively rooted squares of lengths 2a, 2b, and 2c start at position i in w.

name: IsBinary
statement: def IsBinary (w : Word α) : Prop := alphabetSize w ≤ 2
description: Predicate stating a word is binary (uses at most 2 distinct letters).

name: IsKPower
statement: def IsKPower (s : Word α) (k : ℕ) : Prop := k ≥ 2 ∧ ∃ u : Word α, u ≠ [] ∧ s = (List.replicate k u).flatten
description: Predicate stating a word is a k-power (k repetitions of some non-empty root u).

name: numDistinctKPowers
statement: noncomputable def numDistinctKPowers (w : Word α) (k : ℕ) : Finset (Word α) := (w.factors.toFinset).filter (fun s => IsKPower s k)
description: The set of all distinct k-powers occurring in a word w.
